$comment: FC15a (`#`/`##` operators) runtime + A2 witness: PASTE(add,3) pastes to the single token `add3` (a function name) and STR(hello) stringizes to "hello"; add3(12,12,12)=36 plus (int)sizeof("hello")=6 -> exit 42. The PRIMARY witness is the A2 crux: a `#`/`##` product token's span must slice to its product text (`add3`/`"hello"`) in the single synthesized buffer, NOT to `#`/`##` -- otherwise the paste product would not resolve to the function `add3` (link/parse failure) and the stringize product would not be a valid string literal. The paste result feeds a live runtime CALL and the string length feeds an arithmetic add (fold-resistant), and the optimizedPipelines `release` arm runs the shipped pipeline over the same source -- without it the crux witness is vacuous.
